MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-19-2004 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON APR-19-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. AT SETTLEMENT CONF. ON 4/14/04. SUE KAPLAN, COMMISSIONER; D.CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED.

JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI /VERA MU, COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRICE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-19-2004 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-19-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN E. MUNTER FOR PROVE-UP HEARING.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-19-2004 IN DEPT. 505 - WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED AND WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $1125.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE JOHN MUNTER. REPORTER: RHONDA AQUILINA. CLERK: BARBARA HING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAW, LAWRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, CLIFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1010 BUSH STREET, #306, SSAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,125.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
